title: ML Hallucination Check
description: Promise schema for verifying AI model outputs against hallucination criteria

model_id.description: Identifier for the AI model being audited

input_prompt.description: The prompt given to the model

ground_truth.description: Known factual information to verify against (optional)

verification_method.description: Method used to verify the output

hallucination_detected.description: Whether hallucination was detected in the output
